mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task_document WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND (id=#{dataId} OR global_doc_id=#{dataId}) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM task_document WHERE task_id=#{taskId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_document(task_id, source_type, global_doc_id, file_name, file_path, extracted_text, status) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{sourceType}, #{globalDocId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{extractedText}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE task_document SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_document WHERE global_doc_id = #{docId}
